git_head: 55dcc6d Audit G900 phase-3 distinct ladder condition
question: Does the six-nine distinct ladder remain unique when the fork-ladder scan is widened from phase 3 to all mod15 phases?
reading: Across the all-phase mod15 ladder spectrum, the six-nine phase-3 ladder remains the unique failure-to-receipt record. The distinct ladder condition survives the wider scan as necessary for failure-to-receipt, though not yet as a full native construction derivation.

scan_rule.anchor_rule: anchor endpoint e satisfies source_root_slot - e = phase_step mod 15

interpretation_boundary: This is an all-phase mod15 visible ladder spectrum scan over observed full support-table frames.
The prediction rule does not use receipt/support fields.
Receipt/failure labels are used only after prediction for evaluation.
This does not derive the ladder spectrum from the deeper G60 construction.
No closure witness, transport relation, channel, force, physics, GR, Maxwell, QCD, electroweak, or unification claim is made.
